member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.CompleteRegistrationCommand
member.summary: Command to complete registration after certificates have been issued. Creates the user account and activates the identity.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.CompleteRegistrationCommand.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Command to complete registration after certificates have been issued. Creates the user account and activates the identity.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.InitiateRegistrationCommand
member.summary: Command to initiate user registration. Collects user profile data and sends email OTP for verification.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.InitiateRegistrationCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Domain.Enums.DevicePlatform},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command to initiate user registration. Collects user profile data and sends email OTP for verification.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.SendPhoneOtpCommand
member.summary: Command to send phone OTP after email verification.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.SendPhoneOtpCommand.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Command to send phone OTP after email verification.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.SubmitCsrCommand
member.summary: Command to submit CSRs (device and user) along with encrypted key shares. This is Phase 3 of the registration flow.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.SubmitCsrCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.EncryptedShareDto,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.EncryptedShareDto,System.String)
member.summary: Command to submit CSRs (device and user) along with encrypted key shares. This is Phase 3 of the registration flow.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.EncryptedShareDto
member.summary: DTO for encrypted key share data.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.EncryptedShareDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: DTO for encrypted key share data.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.VerifyPhoneOtpCommand
member.summary: Command to verify phone OTP.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Commands.VerifyPhoneOtpCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Command to verify phone OTP.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.ICsrService
member.summary: Service for parsing and validating Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.ICsrService.ParseCsr(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a CSR from DER format (Base64 encoded).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.ICsrService.VerifyCsrSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies the CSR signature using KAZ-SIGN-256.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.ICsrService.ComputePublicKeyFingerprint(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 fingerprint of a public key.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.ICsrService.VerifySignature(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies a payload signature using KAZ-SIGN-256.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.CsrInfo
member.summary: Information extracted from a CSR.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.CsrInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Information extracted from a CSR.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService
member.summary: Service for generating and validating One-Time Passwords (OTP).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService.GenerateOtp
member.summary: Generates a random 6-digit OTP.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService.HashOtp(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes an OTP for secure storage.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService.VerifyOtp(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies an OTP against its hash.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService.SendEmailOtpAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an OTP via email.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IOtpService.SendSmsOtpAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an OTP via SMS.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService
member.summary: Service for managing recovery tokens. Recovery tokens are used for emergency account recovery using Shamir's secret sharing.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService.GenerateTokenAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a new recovery token for a user.
member.param: ID of the associated recovery key share
member.returns: Result containing the generated recovery token (to be saved by user)

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService.VerifyTokenAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a recovery token hash.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService.InitiateRecoveryAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initiates account recovery using a recovery token.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService.CompleteRecoveryAsync(Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes the recovery process by setting up new device keys.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRecoveryTokenService.RevokeAllTokensAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes all active recovery tokens for a user.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult
member.summary: Result of recovery token generation.
member.param: The generated recovery token (must be saved by user offline)
Optional mnemonic phrase representation of the token

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Result of recovery token generation.
member.param: The generated recovery token (must be saved by user offline)
Optional mnemonic phrase representation of the token

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult.Token
member.summary: The generated recovery token (must be saved by user offline)

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult.TokenId
member.summary: Recovery token record ID

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult.TokenVersion
member.summary: Token version number

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult.Mnemonic
member.summary: Optional mnemonic phrase representation of the token

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest
member.summary: Request to initiate account recovery.
member.param: The recovery token provided by user

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Request to initiate account recovery.
member.param: The recovery token provided by user

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.RecoveryToken
member.summary: The recovery token provided by user

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.Email
member.summary: User's registered email

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.NewDeviceId
member.summary: New device identifier

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.NewDeviceName
member.summary: New device name

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.NewDevicePlatform
member.summary: New device platform

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryInitiationRequest.IpAddress
member.summary: Client IP address

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult
member.summary: Result of recovery initiation.
member.param: Encrypted recovery key share (encrypted with recovery password)

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Byte[],System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Result of recovery initiation.
member.param: Encrypted recovery key share (encrypted with recovery password)

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult.RecoverySessionId
member.summary: Unique recovery session identifier

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult.UserId
member.summary: User ID being recovered

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult.EncryptedPartRecovery
member.summary: Encrypted recovery key share (encrypted with recovery password)

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoverySessionResult.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Session expiration time

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionRequest
member.summary: Request to complete account recovery.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionRequest.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Request to complete account recovery.

member.summary: Recovery session ID

member.summary: CSR for new device certificate

member.summary: CSR for new user certificate

member.summary: New encrypted control key share

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionRequest.NewEncryptedPartRecovery
member.summary: New encrypted recovery key share

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionResult
member.summary: Result of recovery completion.
member.param: New device certificate in PEM format
New user certificate in PEM format
New recovery token for future recovery

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionResult.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryTokenResult)
member.summary: Result of recovery completion.
member.param: New device certificate in PEM format
New user certificate in PEM format
New recovery token for future recovery

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.RecoveryCompletionResult.UserId
member.summary: User ID

member.summary: New device certificate in PEM format

member.summary: New user certificate in PEM format

member.summary: New recovery token for future recovery

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRegistrationCertificateService
member.summary: Service for issuing certificates during registration flow. Abstracts the Certificate module integration from Identity module.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRegistrationCertificateService.IssueCertificatesAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues certificates for a registration's CSRs (device and user certificates).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IRegistrationCertificateService.GetCertificatesAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets issued certificates for a registration.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IssuedRegistrationCertificatesDto
member.summary: Result of certificate issuance during registration.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Interfaces.IssuedRegistrationCertificatesDto.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Result of certificate issuance during registration.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Queries.GetCertificateStatusQuery
member.summary: Query to get certificate issuance status for a registration.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Queries.GetCertificateStatusQuery.#ctor(System.Guid)
member.summary: Query to get certificate issuance status for a registration.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Application.Queries.GetCertificateStatusQueryHandler
member.summary: Handler for querying certificate issuance status during registration. Step 6 of the registration flow: Poll for certificate status.
